summary: Completed iteration 2 testing of Nexo One ERP - Public Tax Simulator and Mechanic page with real backend API. All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend simulator works without auth, mechanic page properly connected to backend.

minor.issue: Returns data:null instead of data:[] when no OS exists - frontend handles this but could be cleaner

critical_code_review_comments: Public Tax Simulator endpoints (/api/v1/tax/simulate, /api/v1/tax/ncm-list) correctly bypass authentication
LayoutShell properly excludes /simulador-fiscal from auth-protected routes
Mechanic page now fetches real data from backend API instead of mock data
OS creation sends data to backend and OS appears in table after refresh
seed_data_creation: Test OS created via API and UI during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public simulator page at /simulador-fiscal works without auth. All 16 new backend tests in test_simulator_mechanic.py pass. Mechanic page is now connected to real backend API (not mock data). Token stored in sessionStorage as 'access_token'.

tested_features.public_ncm_list: PASS - GET /api/v1/tax/ncm-list returns 17 NCM items without auth
tested_features.public_simulate_standard: PASS - NCM 84715010 with base_value 5000 returns ibs_amount=462.5
tested_features.public_simulate_invalid_ncm: PASS - Returns 400 error for invalid NCM
tested_features.simulator_frontend_no_auth: PASS - Page loads without login redirect
tested_features.simulator_ncm_dropdown: PASS - Shows items, search works, selection updates calculation
tested_features.simulator_tax_breakdown: PASS - Displays IBS, CBS, Seletivo, Total, Cashback
tested_features.simulator_cesta_basica_badge: PASS - Shows CESTA BASICA badge for zero-rate items
tested_features.sidebar_simulador_link: PASS - Simulador Fiscal link visible in sidebar
tested_features.mechanic_create_os: PASS - Modal form sends data to backend
tested_features.mechanic_os_in_table: PASS - Created OS appears in table with real data
